public_title: Scenario Simulation and Digital Twin Workspace
one_liner_ptbr: Workspace de simulacao de cenarios e digital twin para raciocinio estruturado e apoio a decisao.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for scenario simulation, digital twin reasoning, and structured decision support.
suggested_cta_label: Open Scenario Simulation and Digital Twin Workspace

one_liner_ptbr: Assistente analitico orientado a evidencia, com ingestao documental e respostas fundamentadas em contexto recuperado.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for an evidence-first specialist analyst assistant built around controlled retrieval and document grounding.

public_title: Privacy-preserving PDF Anonymization and Document Sanitization
one_liner_ptbr: Camada de anonimização e sanitizacao de PDFs com foco em privacidade, controle operacional e processamento seguro.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for privacy-preserving PDF anonymization, sanitization, and controlled document transformation.
suggested_cta_label: Open Privacy-preserving PDF Anonymization and Document Sanitization

one_liner_ptbr: Workspace clinico para gasometria e exames relacionados, com camada deterministica e apoio controlado de IA.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for a clinical blood gas analysis workspace with deterministic support and controlled AI assistance.
suggested_cta_label: Open Clinical Blood Gas Analysis Workspace

public_title: Healthcare Unit Operations and Indicator Management
one_liner_ptbr: Camada de gestao operacional de unidade de saude com indicadores, priorizacao, trilha de acao e visibilidade executiva.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for healthcare unit operations, indicators, prioritization, and coordinated management workflows.
suggested_cta_label: Open Healthcare Unit Operations and Indicator Management

public_title: Data Storytelling and Analytical Narrative Workspace
one_liner_ptbr: Camada de data storytelling e narrativa analitica para transformar estrutura em leitura executiva e comunicacao de insight.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for data storytelling, analytical narrative, and multi-view communication of structured insight.
suggested_cta_label: Open Data Storytelling and Analytical Narrative Workspace

one_liner_ptbr: Camada de produto documentada de forma conservadora, com escopo publico ainda em validacao editorial.
one_liner_en: A conservative public-safe case for an infection-focused healthtech product layer with a deliberately narrow public scope.

one_liner_ptbr: Companion de fluxo do plantonista para organizar pacientes, sintetizar contexto e apoiar a passagem de caso.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for an on-call physician workflow companion focused on organization, synthesis, and shift continuity.

one_liner_ptbr: Plataforma de analise documental com RAG, perguntas guiadas e revisao controlada para operacoes intensivas em contexto.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for a RAG analyst built for document-heavy operations and controlled contextual review.
suggested_cta_label: Open RAG Analyst for Document-heavy Operations

public_title: Defensive Security Assessment and Hardening Workspace
one_liner_ptbr: Ferramenta defensiva de assessment e hardening, orientada a usuarios leigos e publicada sem detalhes que facilitem abuso.
one_liner_en: A public-safe technical case for defensive security assessment, posture review, and hardening guidance for non-technical operators.
suggested_cta_label: Open Defensive Security Assessment and Hardening Workspace
